summary: Market stable; AMZN ($207.10) and INTC ($43.87) unchanged from market close. Art market data remains consistent with earlier reports.

briefing: KOSPI fell 6.49% due to Middle East tensions. KRW/USD at 17-year low (1517.3). Art scene features Hirst, Kim Yun-shin, and digital fair updates.
KOSPI fell 6.49% due to Middle East tensions and hawkish BOK outlook. Circuit breaker activated. KRW/USD at 17-year low (1517.3).

KOSPI closed with a 6.49% decline today, 5,405.75 points, amid Middle East tensions and a hawkish BOK outlook. Circuit breaker triggered during intraday trading. KRW/USD exchange rate hit a 17-year low (1517.3). Institutional and foreign selling pressure remains elevated.
